subject: Equipment Audit Reminder
snippet: Hey Aaron, just a reminder that the equipment audit needs to be done by Jan 10...
body_text:
Hey Aaron,

Just a reminder that the equipment audit needs to be done by January 10. I know you've been busy with the kids' school stuff, but this is critical for tournament prep.

Raj already pulled 2 damaged kote pairs last week and updated Airtable. You'll want to verify his count and do the full walkthrough of Storage Room B.

Key things to check:
- Shinai count on Rack A (adult) and Rack A-lower (youth)
- Kote on Shelf B (verify Raj's update)
- Bogu sets on stands D1-D6
- Take photos for documentation

Let me know if you need any help. I'll be at the dojo Tuesday and Thursday evenings.

- Tom

subject: RE: Damaged Kote Update
snippet: Aaron, I finished updating Airtable with the damaged kote info...
body_text:
Aaron,

I finished updating Airtable with the damaged kote info. Here's what I changed:

- Adult Kote L: Changed from 5 to 3 functional pairs
- Added damage notes to equipment records EQ-KT-004 and EQ-KT-005
- Both pairs are now on Shelf B-lower with red damage tags

The torn stitching is on the palmar panels of both pairs. I don't think they're worth repairing — the panels need full replacement which would cost $40-50 each, and at that point you might as well buy new tournament grade pairs.

I took photos of the damage and left them in the shared folder.

Let me know if you want me to do anything else before the audit.

- Raj

subject: Grocery list for the weekend
snippet: Hey babe, can you pick up some stuff from Costco tomorrow morning?...
body_text:
Hey babe, can you pick up some stuff from Costco tomorrow morning?

I need:
- Chicken thighs (bulk)
- Rice (25 lb)
- Almond milk (3 cartons)
- Frozen berries
- Paper towels

Also Kyle needs new hiking boots, his feet grew again. Can you check REI?

Mia has soccer at 2 so I'll take her. You should be free for the block party setup.

Love you,
Elena

subject: Tournament photography - confirming Jan 17
snippet: Hi Aaron! Just confirming I can volunteer for tournament photos on Jan 17...
body_text:
Hi Aaron!

Just confirming I can volunteer for tournament photos on January 17. I'll bring my Canon R6 and the 70-200mm lens which works great for action shots.

A few questions:
1. What time should I arrive for setup?
2. Do you want candid shots only or also posed group photos?
3. Is there a specific area I should avoid? (I know some parents don't want their kids photographed)
4. Should I bring lighting equipment or is the dojo bright enough?

Also happy to help with the photography setup on Jan 15 if you need it.

Let me know!
Maya

subject: Re: Equipment Audit Reminder
snippet: Tom, I'm heading to the dojo this morning to start the audit...
body_text:
Tom,

I'm heading to the dojo this morning to start the audit. Going to take photos of everything in Storage Room B and cross-check against Airtable.

I saw Raj's update about the damaged kote. I'll verify his count and make sure everything matches.

Should have the Monday board updated by end of day.

- Aaron
